rag_grep_retrieval_check.interpretation: If n_failed_chunks_contained_gold_file > 0, rag_search's retrieved chunks DID surface the gold file in at least that many failed runs -- for those runs, the failure is not a retrieval-recall failure (the file was in the tool result); it is a stopping/verification failure, same shape as grep's. Remaining failures (n_failed_chunks_never_contained_gold_file) are genuine retrieval misses.
